definition: Sum of transaction net revenue after discounts and excluding returns.
why_used: Top-line demand is the first board-level signal of commercial scale.
what_it_signals: Growth or contraction in market demand, product-market fit and campaign reach.
business_action: Investigate by month, category, channel and province; protect supply for demand peaks.
report_placement: Executive Overview, Monthly Trend, AI Command Center

definition: Revenue less modeled product cost and fulfillment economics.
why_used: Revenue without margin can destroy value; margin shows the quality of growth.
what_it_signals: Whether the business is buying growth too expensively or selling profitable baskets.
business_action: Prioritize margin-positive bundles, pricing reviews and channel mix changes.
report_placement: Executive Overview, Category KPI, Product KPI

definition: Gross margin divided by net revenue.
why_used: Normalizes margin so categories and channels can be compared fairly.
what_it_signals: Margin compression, discount overuse, poor channel economics or weak product mix.
business_action: Tighten discount rules, promote higher-margin products, renegotiate COGS assumptions.
report_placement: Executive Overview, Category KPI, Finance Pack

definition: Net revenue divided by distinct orders.
why_used: AOV shows basket depth and upsell effectiveness.
what_it_signals: Whether customers are buying single items or building richer baskets.
business_action: Launch bundles, recommendations, threshold offers and accessory attach campaigns.
report_placement: Marketing Report, A/B Testing, AI Command Center

definition: Return amount divided by net revenue.
why_used: Returns are direct margin leakage and a customer-experience signal.
what_it_signals: Fit/sizing issues, unclear PDP content, damaged delivery, buyer remorse or quality issues.
business_action: Improve size guides, PDP detail, reviews, post-purchase education and exception reporting.
report_placement: ML Monitoring, Accounting Governance, COO Watchlist

definition: Highest revenue category in the modeled catalog and transaction estate.
why_used: Shows which category deserves executive attention and protected availability.
what_it_signals: Where customer demand is concentrated and where stockouts would hurt most.
business_action: Protect inventory, create SEO hubs, develop bundles and track category share monthly.
report_placement: Category KPI, SEO Roadmap, Executive Dossier

definition: Revenue divided by estimated channel spend.
why_used: ROAS controls media efficiency and prevents scaling unprofitable traffic.
what_it_signals: Which acquisition journeys are efficient versus experimental or wasteful.
business_action: Scale high-ROAS journeys; constrain low-ROAS spend until creative and landing pages improve.
report_placement: Marketing ROI, Channel Intelligence, A/B Test Pack

definition: Difference in conversion, AOV or margin between control and variant.
why_used: Testing separates opinion from evidence before using Azure credit or media budget.
what_it_signals: Whether a bundle, threshold, copy or landing-page change creates measurable lift.
business_action: Roll out significant winners; keep inconclusive tests as learning only.
report_placement: A/B Test Results, Growth Marketing Report

definition: Area under ROC curve for the return-risk classifier.
why_used: AUC measures ranking quality across thresholds.
what_it_signals: Whether the model can separate risky orders from normal orders better than chance.
business_action: Use as a watchlist and improve with real return reasons, sizing and delivery signals.

definition: Share of actual return-risk cases captured by the model.
why_used: For operations, missing risky returns is usually worse than reviewing extra orders.
what_it_signals: How much return exposure can be surfaced early.
business_action: Route high-risk cohorts to PDP fixes, customer education and service follow-up.

definition: Compares ecommerce sales/refunds/VAT to SAP or accounting postings.
why_used: Finance needs provable close controls, not only dashboard totals.
what_it_signals: Unposted refunds, settlement timing gaps, VAT exceptions or account mapping issues.
business_action: Create exception owners and include reconciliations in monthly close evidence.

definition: Source and target row counts for uploaded files, tables and semantic model inputs.
why_used: A simple but powerful audit control that catches missing or duplicated loads.
what_it_signals: Pipeline completeness, accidental truncation, duplicate loads or stale extracts.
business_action: Block refresh promotion when row counts deviate outside tolerance.
report_placement: Fabric Proof, Source Register, Governance Scorecard

definition: Maps website, generated data, Fabric paths, Power BI model, reports and Git commits.
why_used: Lineage makes the work auditable and easier to operate.
what_it_signals: Whether a KPI can be traced back to a reliable source and transformation route.
business_action: Publish lineage with every report refresh and monthly close pack.
report_placement: Source Register, Git Proof, Completion Report

definition: Azure Fabric Fabric capacity running or paused state.
why_used: Cloud cost control is part of senior BI ownership.
what_it_signals: Whether proof infrastructure is still consuming Azure credit.
business_action: Resume only for refresh/demo; suspend after review.
